topics.title: American Idol and Comedy Career Prospects
topics.summary: The studio discusses the entertainment value of American Idol contestant Sanjaya, the complexities of securing a sitcom deal, and the humorous fallout from a recent interview with Chris Rock.

topics.title: Host Confronts Caller Over Alleged Affair
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange with a caller named Lexi who disputes claims of making out with Artie during an intoxicated state after a show.

topics.title: Drunken Behavior and Relationship Conflict
topics.summary: The studio explores the consequences of a woman's intoxicated behavior at a show, including her inappropriate advances toward a host and the resulting tension in her relationship.

topics.title: Nervous Mark Character Development
topics.summary: The studio discusses the creation of the "Nervous Mark" persona, a recurring comedy bit involving an anxious caller, and shares anecdotes about personal health and recent interactions with former colleagues.

topics.title: Andy Richter's Career Transition
topics.summary: The studio explores Andy Richter's decision to leave the Conan O'Brien show for a development deal and his experiences as an actor and comedian.

topics.title: Television Production and Celebrity Experiences
topics.summary: The studio explores the grueling demands of early television production, the dynamics of network meetings, and personal anecdotes regarding celebrity appearances and medical history.

topics.title: American Idol and Sanjaya's Performance
topics.summary: The studio discusses the polarizing performance of contestant Sanjaya on American Idol, his support from Howard Stern, and a new sitcom project involving an accountant who takes on private investigation work.

topics.title: Music Submissions and Media Blunders
topics.summary: The studio reviews a series of listener-submitted songs, discusses the impact of American Idol, and reacts to reports of pornographic content accidentally airing on a local news station.

topics.title: Production Errors and Workplace Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses a past production error involving an inappropriate tape sent to a dying woman, the career trajectories of various staff members, and personal anecdotes regarding childhood illnesses and hygiene.

topics.title: Personal Anecdotes and Industry Discussions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments ranging from personal stories about childhood medical procedures and jail experiences to discussions on the lack of edge in modern celebrity culture and a new film project involving music management.

topics.title: ADD Medication and Pornography Industry Statistics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the side effects of ADD medication, the high revenue figures within the global pornography industry, and upcoming guest appearances on late-night talk shows.

topics.title: Negotiating Salary and Insurance for a New Rig
topics.summary: The studio explores the financial considerations of salary negotiations, purchasing property, and securing insurance policies for vehicles.

topics.title: Engagement and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The show features a conversation regarding the personal experiences of an engagement, upcoming media appearances, and various topics including local news reports and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: Engagement Dynamics and Drug Safety Warnings
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the dynamics of engagement, the risks associated with driving while using sedative medications like Ambien, and various pop culture topics including Pete Rose's gambling history and poorly executed cover songs.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Contract Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the death of Brad Delp, Eric Carmen's legal issues, M. Night Shyamalan's upcoming film, Regis Philbin's surgery, celebrity pregnancies, and a tense contract negotiation with Riley Martin.

topics.title: Celebrity Pregnancies and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers celebrity pregnancy rumors, the admission of a 9/11 mastermind at Guantanamo Bay, debates over troop withdrawals from Iraq, and updates on various legal cases and upcoming comedy tours.
